calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Barbara Gross In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Entry Of Default Judgment And Setting Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant C.W. Building Maintenance, a California corporation and dba CW Building Maintenance, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:02 a.m.

Barbara R. Gross, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Everest National Insurance Company, a Delaware corporation.
Georgette Sadusk, Collections Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Gross and Ms. Sadusk appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant C.W. Building Maintenance, a California corporation and dba CW Building Maintenance, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Account Stated and Open Book Account was filed on August 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant C.W. Building Maintenance, a California corporation and dba CW Building Maintenance, Inc., and personally served on defendant's Agent of Process on September 23, 2021.
Default was to defendant C.W. Building Maintenance, a California corporation and dba CW Building Maintenance, Inc., was entered on 10/26/2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 3, 2021.

Plaintiff Everest National Insurance Company, a Delaware corporation, submits the following exhibts for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Workers' Compensation Insurance information page...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Premium Adjustment Notice..................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Workers' Compensation Final Audit Invoice..................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Everest National Insurance Company, a Delaware corporation, and against the defaulted defendant C.W. Building Maintenance, a California corporation and dba CW Building Maintenance, Inc., Jr., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $59,485.56.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,194.80.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $555.19.

Total - $63,235.55.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:11 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Continued To Aug-31-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
